metadata.cycle: dawn (00:34-00:50 MYT 21 Jul; articles published 20-21 Jul — PH manifesto launch evening of 20 Jul + Fahmi-KJ exchange)
metadata.sentiment_convention: SIGNED -1.0 to +1.0. Negative < -0.20; Neutral -0.20 to +0.20; Positive > +0.20.
metadata.critical_threshold: Sharp shift >30% for PIR-06; Bersatu sharp-negative = [CRITICAL]; PIR-16 [CRITICAL] if hard-news corroborates 'Bersatu exit imminent?' OR 'sasar bentuk kerajaan' OR viral >50%
metadata.entity_build: DELTA over rev23 (362 entities). Source: dawn extraction entities-20260721-0059.json (00:59 MYT, 43 entities from 12 genuinely-new PRN-relevant articles collected 00:34-00:50 MYT 21 Jul). rev23 (00:22 MYT) was built on the night3 TheVibes recovery and explicitly noted 'No Day-2-late or 21-Jul content has been scraped yet' — the dawn extraction (00:59) is POST-rev23 and contains genuinely-new content: PH manifesto launch (20 Jul evening, fully covered across Awani+FMT EN/BM+HarianMetro), Fahmi-KJ narrative exchange (first direct PH-govt response), Anwar campaign schedule (Wed 22 Jul), MCMC 3R enforcement targeting Tuanku Muhriz, Seri Menanti 3-cornered fight profiled. 32 NEW entities; 12 existing entities updated (11 from extraction + 1 carry-forward-driven derhaka update). Total: 394 entities (25 critical / 139 priority / 230 none). NO new [CRITICAL] threshold crossings; all 25 [CRITICAL] carried from rev23. 32nd consecutive cycle without a critical-threshold crossing.
metadata.source_outlets_new: FMT (BM+EN), Astro Awani, Harian Metro — dawn cycle
metadata.source_outlets_cumulative: HarianMetro, Buletin TV3 (gnews), Utusan, Sinar, FMT, MalayMail, Awani, NST, Kosmo, BERNAMA, Berita Harian, The Edge, Newswav, TRP, Astro Awani, TheVibes

new_entities.rationale: NEW rev24 (dawn cycle). PH communications director, Comms Minister, govt spokesman. Delivers FIRST direct PH-government response to KJ's 'signal to PH' narrative. Rebuttal is composed and effective: enumerates 5 Malay-Muslim PH leaders (Anwar, Mat Sabu, Dzulkefly, Amirudin, Aminuddin), warns KJ 'don't go overboard', characterises KJ's rhetoric as personal political-relevance seeking, and clarifies PM issued NO resignation order (only discipline reminder). Central to PIR-16 narrative-exchange watch. Positive — effective counter-narrative execution by PH's chief communicator. [PRIORITY] — first PH-govt response to a key PIR-16 narrative; watch for KJ counter-response.

NEW rev24 (dawn cycle). Ex-Umno Youth chief; 'BN-PN cooperation = signal to PH on Malay sensitivities.' Now DIRECTLY REBUTTED by Fahmi — 'don't go overboard'; 'stop spreading falsehoods'; characterised as 'will say whatever necessary to be noticed' after returning to Umno. 3rd-cycle corroboration of KJ 'signal' framing but now met with direct PH-government counter-response. As a person his credibility is now actively contested. Mildly negative; declining (narrative battle turning against him). [PRIORITY] — central PIR-16 exchange figure.

new_entities.entity: PH lacks Malay-Muslim leaders (KJ claim, rebutted by Fahmi)
new_entities.rationale: NEW rev24. KJ implies PH has no leaders defending Malay-Muslim interests. Fahmi rebuts by enumerating: Anwar Ibrahim (PKR president), Mohamad Sabu (Amanah president), Dzulkefly Ahmad (Amanah), Amirudin Shari (PKR VP), Aminuddin Harun (PKR VP). 'Stop spreading falsehoods. Don't deny the presence of Malay-Muslim leaders in PH.' A negative attack claim now directly rebutted — contested but the claim was made publicly across FMT EN+BM. Negative (falsehood rebutted); stable (rebuttal neutralises escalation). [PRIORITY].

new_entities.entity: Don't go overboard (Fahmi rebuttal to KJ)
new_entities.rationale: NEW rev24. Fahmi's direct advice to KJ: 'Don't become so fixated on certain views that you end up denying the presence of Malay-Muslim leaders in PH and reinforcing false perceptions.' First direct PH government response to KJ's 'signal' narrative. Effective counter-narrative — defends PH's Malay-Muslim credentials while warning against false perceptions. Positive; stable. [PRIORITY] — significant PIR-16 narrative development.

new_entities.entity: KJ driven by political relevance (Fahmi characterisation)
new_entities.rationale: NEW rev24. Fahmi: KJ 'was out of Umno for quite some time. Now rebuilding support base, will say whatever necessary to make people notice him.' Frames KJ's Malay-sensitivity rhetoric as personal political motivation, not genuine concern. Counter-frame undermining KJ's credibility. Mildly negative; stable. [none].

new_entities.entity: Anwar discipline warning / no resignation order
new_entities.rationale: NEW rev24. Fahmi clarifies PM issued NO order for any minister/deputy minister to resign. Anwar only reminded all officeholders to maintain unity, discipline, professionalism during PRN campaign. Parties in unity govt contested separately in prior state elections — democratic differences allowed. Investor confidence/stability = key consideration. RESOLVES ambiguity from prior cycle's 'resign if attack colleagues' warning. Tok Mat ready to resign if ordered; Khaled 'no need to wait'; Loke agrees. Clarifying/defusing narrative. Positive (resolves ambiguity, maintains unity). [PRIORITY] — resolves a carry-forward watch item.

NEW rev24. PH NS PRN16 manifesto launched 20 Jul evening. Theme 'Stabil, Makmur, Inklusif' / 'Negeri Sembilan Kekal Harapan.' 10 commitments: stable govt, SSR improvements, 30,000 high-paying jobs, quality education, 20,000 affordable homes, land issues, youth/women/family, tourism+Adat Perpatih, FELDA development, modern agriculture, 5 high-impact infrastructure projects, interfaith harmony. Was PENDING in prior cycle — now FULLY COVERED across Awani + FMT EN/BM + HarianMetro (4 outlets). Major campaign event. Positive (strong PH coherence, multi-outlet propagation). [PRIORITY] — carries forward the PH performance-vs-promise narrative.

NEW rev24. Aminuddin's core manifesto framing: 'mampu dilaksanakan, bukan hanya janji.' Track record: nearly all prior manifesto items implemented except those requiring DUN law changes (blocked before 5 Jun dissolution). 'Not a coalition that governed for decades, but delivered in 8 years.' Counter-narrative to BN-PN 'penyatuan Melayu-Islam' framing. Positive (performance-based credibility). [PRIORITY].

new_entities.entity: Senjata utama kempen, avoid retorik kosong (Aminuddin directive)
new_entities.rationale: NEW rev24. Aminuddin's directive to all PH candidates: use manifesto as 'senjata utama kempen' (main campaign weapon); avoid 'fitnah, bergaduh, retorik kosong.' Candidates must read, understand, deliver manifesto content daily. Message discipline from state chairman — pairs with federal Anwar discipline warning. Positive (coherent campaign discipline). [PRIORITY].

NEW rev24. Aminuddin's long-term vision; urges mandate to realise. NS positioned as growth corridor connecting KL (finance) + Selangor (industry) + Melaka (tourism/maritime). 'Negeri laluan -> negeri destinasi utama pelaburan dan inovasi.' Positive (forward-looking economic vision). [none].

new_entities.entity: Negeri destinasi utama pelaburan (Aminuddin economic vision)
new_entities.rationale: NEW rev24. Aminuddin reframes NS: 'bukan lagi negeri di tengah perjalanan, tetapi pusat kepada perjalanan itu' — from transit state to primary investment/innovation destination. Counter to 'negeri laluan' perception. Positive (economic reframe). [none].

NEW rev24. Aminuddin explicitly states proposed 2-term MB limit was 'ditolak awal oleh UMNO dulu.' Only unfulfilled PH manifesto item. Touches PH-Umno intra-unity-government reform friction; reform blocked by coalition partner. PIR-06 intra-coalition tension signal. Non-critical — historical, pre-dissolution (blocked before 5 Jun). New friction vector worth watching but does NOT approach the Bersatu-PN [CRITICAL] threshold. Negative; stable. [PRIORITY] — new intra-coalition reform-friction signal.

NEW rev24. PKR secretary-general (Setiausaha Agung PKR); present at PH NS manifesto launch. Federal-level PH leadership presence at state manifesto event. Mildly positive (coalition cohesion signal). [none].

new_entities.entity: Hatta Md Ramli (Mohd Hatta Md Ramli)
new_entities.rationale: NEW rev24. Amanah VP (Naib Presiden AMANAH); present at PH NS manifesto launch. Federal opposition-party leadership supporting state campaign. Mildly positive. [none].
NEW rev24. Amanah NS chairman (Pengerusi Amanah Negeri Sembilan); present at manifesto launch alongside Aminuddin + Loke. State-level coalition leadership. Mildly positive. [none].

NEW rev24. Amanah president; cited by Fahmi as Malay-Muslim PH leader in rebuttal to KJ's claim that PH lacks Malay-Muslim leadership. Positive visibility as evidence in the narrative rebuttal. [none].
NEW rev24. Amanah leader; cited by Fahmi as Malay-Muslim PH leader in rebuttal to KJ. Positive visibility. [none].

NEW rev24. BN stronghold; 3-cornered fight PH (Kamarul) vs BN (Sufian) vs Bersatu (Megat Shahriman). Royal institution connection — Yang di-Pertuan Besar NS resides here. PH candidate optimistic about 'momentum perubahan'. Tourism + agriculture + Adat Perpatih education focus. Under Rancangan Tempatan Daerah Kuala Pilah 2035. Contested seat; neutral. [PRIORITY] — 3-cornered battleground with royal-institution dimension.

NEW rev24. PH candidate DUN Seri Menanti. Pledges tourism + agriculture as economic drivers to attract youth back. Proposes Adat Perpatih education module (royal institution resides in Seri Menanti). Optimistic about 'momentum perubahan' despite BN stronghold. Product: longan Brazil at Kampung Buyau. Mildly positive (optimistic challenger). [none].

new_entities.entity: Datuk Seri Megat D Shahriman Zaharudin
new_entities.rationale: NEW rev24. Bersatu candidate DUN Seri Menanti; 3-cornered fight vs PH + BN. Confirms Bersatu contesting solo logo in Seri Menanti (separate from PN). Reinforces 'sasar bentuk kerajaan (Bersatu solo)' structural evidence (already [CRITICAL] in rev23). Mildly negative (Bersatu-PN structural separation). [PRIORITY] — structural corroboration of Bersatu solo-logo arrangement.

new_entities.entity: Anwar campaign schedule (Wed 22 Jul — Sikamat + Paroi)
new_entities.rationale: NEW rev24. PM Anwar expected to campaign Wednesday 22 Jul at Sikamat (N.13 CRITICAL) + Paroi (N.25) — both Tier-4 critical/priority seats. 'Majlis yang besar' planned. Aminuddin: Anwar's absence at manifesto launch 'not an issue.' First confirmed Anwar ground-campaign schedule for PRN NS. Positive (PH ground reinforcement of battleground seats). [PRIORITY] — next major PIR-07 watch event.

NEW rev24. PH manifesto pledges: (1) Seremban Sentral + increased commuter frequency; (2) Hospital Bandar Enstek; (3) Port Dickson international port; (4) Senawang-Port Klang rail bypass; (5) legal amendments for Felda 2nd/3rd-gen settlers to build 2nd homes on parents' land. Concrete deliverable pledges. Positive. [none].
NEW rev24. Economic corridor project rebranding; Aminuddin positions NS as 'koridor pertumbuhan baharu' connecting Lembah Klang + south. Part of PH economic-vision narrative. Positive. [none].
NEW rev24. High-tech industrial project named in PH manifesto; part of job-creation strategy (30,000 high-paying jobs). Positive. [none].

new_entities.entity: Nilai Advanced Photonic AI Manufacturing City
new_entities.rationale: NEW rev24. Advanced manufacturing project named in PH manifesto; semiconductor/aerospace/data centre/digital economy expansion. Connects to N.10 Nilai (Tier-4, 5-cornered fight) economic narrative. Positive. [none].

NEW rev24. MCMC + PDRM investigating 3R (religion, race, royal institution) content targeting Yang di-Pertuan Besar NS Tuanku Muhriz. Individual recorded under Section 233 CMA 1998 (max RM500k fine / 2 yrs jail). MCMC warns all parties to avoid 3R during campaign. Connects to 'derhaka' narrative thread (royal institution). Escalates the derhaka friction at Pertang via regulatory enforcement. Negative (3R enforcement = campaign-speech regulatory guardrail; royal-institution sensitivity). [PRIORITY] — reinforces royal-institution dimension of derhaka thread.

NEW rev24. Yang di-Pertuan Besar Negeri Sembilan; target of 3R content under MCMC/PDRM investigation. Resides in Seri Menanti (royal institution connection to DUN Seri Menanti). Central to April 19 crisis context (4 undangs claimed he was removed -> 14 Umno ADUN withdrew support). 3R enforcement = regulatory guardrail for campaign. Mildly negative (target of 3R content); stable. [PRIORITY] — central to royal-institution dimension.

new_entities.entity: MCMC Network Monitoring Centre (Pusat Pemantauan Rangkaian)
new_entities.rationale: NEW rev24. MCMC activates Network Monitoring Centre for PRN N9. Receives complaints re: network coverage, telecom quality, online 3R content. Hotline 06-4794907 / 06-4794912. Early voting 28 Jul, polling 1 Aug confirmed. Neutral (regulatory infrastructure). [none].
NEW rev24. Legal basis for MCMC 3R enforcement; max RM500,000 fine or 2 years jail or both. Regulatory framework governing campaign speech/content during PRN NS. Neutral. [none].

NEW rev24. Location of Fahmi's Ziarah Kasih programme where he delivered KJ rebuttal + Anwar clarification. Felda settlement in Jempol district — connects to FELDA development manifesto pledge. Neutral. [none].

NEW rev24. PH manifesto welfare pledge: RM1,500 one-off cash aid undergrads, RM2,400 living cost aid IPTA students, RM5,000 first-class grads, free laptops, RM300 seniors, RM200 SSPN for newborns, school aid, scholarships, single mothers, cancer patients, dialysis/orthopedic aid. Cradle-to-grave welfare framing. Positive. [none].

NEW rev24. PH manifesto: Perpatih Fest + standardised allowances for adat chiefs. Seri Menanti PH candidate proposes Adat Perpatih education module. Connects royal institution (Seri Menanti) + cultural heritage to campaign narrative. Positive. [none].

Reinforces statesmanship + unity posture. Score +0.42 -> +0.43 (marginal). Stable. [PRIORITY] — DAP SG central to PIR-16 narrative chain.
